block.header: aki tu mi kamwi to ame no sita sira si myesu yamato ne kwo sumyera ga opo mikoto rama to noritamapu opo mikoto wo mi kwo tati opo kimi tati omi tati tukasa dukasa no pito domo ame no sita no opo mi takara moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,3@命乎親王等諸王等諸臣等百官人等天下公民衆聞宣,*

sentence.transcription: aki tu mi kamwi to
ame no sita sira si myesu
yamato ne kwo sumyera ga opo mikoto rama to noritamapu

sentence.kanji: 命乎親王等諸王等諸臣等百官人等天下公民衆聞宣
sentence.transcription: opo mikoto wo mi kwo tati opo kimi tati omi tati tukasa dukasa no pito domo ame no sita no opo mi takara moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

block.header: takama no para yu amori masi si sumyera ga mi yo wo pazimete ko no taka mi kura ni imasite ame tuti ya mo wo wosame tamapi totonope tamapu koto pa piziri no kimi to imasite sakasi ki omi tukape maturi ame no sita tapirake ku tukasa dukasa yasu ku site si ame tuti no opo ki sirusi pa arapare ku to namo kamu nagara omoposi mye saku to noritamapu opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

sentence.transcription: takama no para yu amori masi si
sumyera ga mi yo wo pazimete
ko no taka mi kura ni imasite
ame tuti ya mo wo wosame tamapi totonope tamapu
koto pa piziri no kimi to imasite
sakasi ki
omi tukape maturi
ame no sita tapirake ku
tukasa dukasa yasu ku site si
ame tuti no opo ki
sirusi pa arapare ku to namo
kamu nagara omoposi mye saku to noritamapu
opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

block.header: kaku noritamapu pa opo mikoto ni imase sumyera wa ga mi yo ni atarite pa sumyera to imasu ware mo kiki mot a ru koto tomosi ku mi mot a ru okonapi sukuna mi wa ga omi to site tukape maturu pito tati mo pito tu puta tu wo mora si otosu koto mo ara mu ka to katazikena mi paduzukasi mi omoposi masite wa ga opo kimi opo ki sumyera mikoto no opo mapye ni kasi kwo zimono sizimapi papi moto pori mawosi tama pi uke tamapara ku pa mapye tu kimi tati no twopi ko mu maturi goto wo ba kaku ya kotape tamapa mu kaku ya kotape tamapa mu to mawosi tamapu tukasa ni ya wosame tamapa mu to mawosi tama peba wosipe tamapi omobuke tamapi kotape tamapi noritamapu manima ni ko no wosu kuni ame no sita no maturi goto wo okonapi tamapi siki tamapitutu tukape maturi tamapu apida ni mi satwo dukasa no kami piro ki mi tu no kurawi pudipara no asomi marora i pumi op yeru kame pito tu tatematuraku to mawosi tama pu ni kikosi myesi odoroki tamapi ayasibwi tamapi misonapasi yorokobwi tamapi mede tamapi te omoposi myesa ku pa utusi ku mo sumyera wa ga maturi goto no itas eru mono ni ara me ya

comment.raw: IP-MAT,PP-TOP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,PP-TOP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,PP-TOP,NP,8@事母在牟加止辱美愧美所思坐而,*
IP-MAT,PP-TOP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,PP-TOP,NP,IP-REL,PP-DAT,NP,10@天皇大前尓恐古士物進退匍匐廻保理白賜比受被賜久者卿等乃問来,*
IP-MAT,PP-TOP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,NP,14@官尓耶治賜止白賜倍婆教賜,*
IP-MAT,PP-TOP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,17@此乃食国天下之政乎行賜敷賜乍供奉賜,*
IP-MAT,PP-TOP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,PP,NP,20@従三位藤原朝臣麻呂等伊負図,*
IP-MAT,PP-TOP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,NP,21@亀一頭献止奏賜不尓所聞行驚賜恠賜所見行歓賜嘉賜氐所思行久者于都斯久母,*

sentence.transcription: kaku noritamapu pa opo mikoto ni imase
sumyera wa ga mi yo ni atarite pa
sumyera to imasu
ware mo kiki mot a ru
koto tomosi ku mi mot a ru
okonapi sukuna mi
wa ga omi to site tukape maturu
pito tati mo pito tu puta tu wo mora si otosu

sentence.kanji: 事母在牟加止辱美愧美所思坐而
sentence.transcription: koto mo ara mu ka to katazikena mi paduzukasi mi omoposi masite
wa ga opo kimi opo ki

sentence.kanji: 天皇大前尓恐古士物進退匍匐廻保理白賜比受被賜久者卿等乃問来
sentence.transcription: sumyera mikoto no opo mapye ni kasi kwo zimono sizimapi papi moto pori mawosi tama pi uke tamapara ku pa mapye tu kimi tati no twopi ko mu
maturi goto wo ba kaku ya kotape tamapa mu
kaku ya kotape tamapa mu to
mawosi tamapu

sentence.kanji: 官尓耶治賜止白賜倍婆教賜
sentence.transcription: tukasa ni ya wosame tamapa mu to mawosi tama peba wosipe tamapi
omobuke tamapi kotape tamapi noritamapu
manima ni

sentence.kanji: 此乃食国天下之政乎行賜敷賜乍供奉賜
sentence.transcription: ko no wosu kuni ame no sita no maturi goto wo okonapi tamapi siki tamapitutu tukape maturi tamapu
apida ni
mi satwo dukasa no kami piro ki

sentence.kanji: 従三位藤原朝臣麻呂等伊負図
sentence.transcription: mi tu no kurawi pudipara no asomi marora i pumi op yeru

sentence.kanji: 亀一頭献止奏賜不尓所聞行驚賜恠賜所見行歓賜嘉賜氐所思行久者于都斯久母
sentence.transcription: kame pito tu tatematuraku to mawosi tama pu ni kikosi myesi odoroki tamapi ayasibwi tamapi misonapasi yorokobwi tamapi mede tamapi te omoposi myesa ku pa utusi ku mo
sumyera wa ga maturi goto no itas eru
mono ni ara me ya

block.header: ko pa opo ki sumyera mikoto no atu ki piro ki utukusubwi wo kagapurite taka ki taputwo ki okonapi ni yorite arapare kyeru opo ki sirusi no mono so to noritamapu opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

sentence.transcription: ko pa opo ki
sumyera mikoto no atu ki piro ki
utukusubwi wo kagapurite
taka ki taputwo ki
okonapi ni yorite arapare kyeru opo ki
sirusi no mono so to noritamapu
opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

block.header: koto wakite nori tamapa ku ko no opo ki sirusi no mono pa ame ni masu kamwi kuni ni masu kamwi no api udunapi maturi sakipape maturu koto ni yorite arapasi matur e ru taputwo ki sirusi naru wo motite mi yo no na aratame tamapi kape tamapu

sentence.transcription: koto wakite nori tamapa ku ko no opo ki
sirusi no mono pa ame ni masu
kamwi kuni ni masu

sentence.kanji: 神乃相宇豆奈比奉福奉
sentence.transcription: kamwi no api udunapi maturi sakipape maturu
koto ni yorite arapasi matur e ru taputwo ki
sirusi naru wo motite
mi yo no na aratame tamapi kape tamapu

block.header: koko wo motite zinki no mu tose wo aratamete tempiyau no pazime no tosi to site ame no sita piro ku tumi yurusi tamapi tukasa dukasa no sakwan ywori kami tukata no pito domo kagapuri kurawi pito sina age tamapu koto wo pazime pito tu puta tu no yorokobwi no opo mikoto wo utukusibwi tamapi okonapi tamapu to noritamapu sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,4@百官主典已上人等冠位一階上賜,*

sentence.transcription: koko wo motite
zinki no mu tose wo aratamete
tempiyau no pazime no tosi to site
ame no sita piro ku

sentence.kanji: 百官主典已上人等冠位一階上賜
sentence.transcription: tumi yurusi tamapi
tukasa dukasa no sakwan ywori kami tukata no pito domo kagapuri kurawi pito sina age tamapu
koto wo pazime
pito tu puta tu no yorokobwi no opo mikoto wo utukusibwi tamapi
okonapi tamapu to noritamapu
sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu
